testsuite.name: DemoQA Alerts, Frames and Browser Windows
Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: user navigates to DemoQA Browser Windows page
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: User clicks on "Alerts, Frame & Windows" in the left panel
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: User clicks on "Alerts" menu item
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: User clicks the "Click me" button to trigger an alert
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: The alert should be accepted successfully
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: User clicks the button to trigger a confirm box
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: The confirm box should be accepted and result shows "You selected Ok"
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: User clicks the button to trigger a prompt and enters "DemoQA Test"
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testcase.name: The prompt result should display "You entered DemoQA Test"
testcase.classname: Handle all alert types on the Alerts page

testsuite.name: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: user navigates to DemoQA Browser Windows page
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: User clicks on "Alerts, Frame & Windows" in the left panel
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: User clicks on "Frames" menu item
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: User switches to the top frame
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: The top frame should display the heading "This is a sample page"
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: User switches back to the main page
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: User switches to the bottom frame
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: The bottom frame should display the heading "This is a sample page"
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testcase.name: User switches back to the main page
testcase.classname: Verify content inside top and bottom frames

testsuite.name: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: user navigates to DemoQA Browser Windows page
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks on "Alerts, Frame & Windows" in the left panel
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks on "Browser Windows" menu item
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks the "New Tab" button
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: A new tab should open with the expected URL
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: The new tab should display the heading "This is a sample page"
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User switches back to the original tab
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: The original tab should still display the Browser Windows page
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content
